title: Interactive Exercise
description:
Create a Vehicle hierarchy:
- Vehicle (parent): brand, year, start(), stop()
- Car (child): num_doors, additional info
- Motorcycle (child): has_sidecar, additional info
Both children should override info() and add specific methods
instructions:
Create a Vehicle hierarchy:
- Vehicle (parent): brand, year, start(), stop()
- Car (child): num_doors, additional info
- Motorcycle (child): has_sidecar, additional info
Both children should override info() and add specific methods

hints.text: Use super().__init__() to call parent constructor. Override info() to provide specific details.

commonMistakes.mistake: Forgetting to call super().__init__() in child class
commonMistakes.correction: Call super().__init__() before setting child-specific attributes
